Inclement Weather Alert: February 25, 2026
Due to the impact of the snowstorm, NJIT day and evening classes will be remote on Wednesday, February 25th. Library services will be remote. Please see NJIT E-mail for additional details.

Office of University Admissions

New Jersey Institute of Technology
Office of University Admissions
Fenster Hall, Room 100
University Heights
Newark, NJ 07102-1982

Phone: 1-800-925-NJIT / 973-596-3300
Fax: 973-596-3461
Email: admissions@njit.edu

Summer Office Hours:
Monday - Friday, 8:30 a.m. - 5:00 p.m.

Exceptions:

  • Tuesday, May 26 - Friday, May 29, 9:00 a.m. - 4:00 p.m. (closed on Monday, May 25, in observance of Memorial Day)
  • Monday, June 15 - Thursday, June 18, 9:00 a.m. - 4:00 p.m. (closed on Friday, June 19, in observance of Juneteenth)
  • Monday, June 29 - Thursday, July 2, 9:00 a.m. - 4:00 p.m. (closed on Friday, July 3, in observance of Independence Day)

    • Associate Provost, University Admissions

    • Director of Admission and Recruitment Marketing
  • Cottingim, Cory
    • Director of Graduate and International Admissions

    • Director of Systems & Analytics – University Admissions
